task_completion.description: Access the configuration page for the 'legacy-inventory-sync' job.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins interface shows the configuration page for the 'legacy-inventory-sync' job (e.g., 'Configure' is selected in the left sidebar and the job name is visible).

task_completion.description: Configure a Quiet Period of 120 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the General or Advanced project options, the 'Quiet period' checkbox is checked and the input field contains the value '120'.
Under the 'Build Triggers' section, the 'Poll SCM' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Set the Poll SCM schedule to run every 15 minutes between 8:00 AM and 6:00 PM on weekdays.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Schedule text area under 'Poll SCM' contains a valid cron expression matching the requirements, such as 'H/15 8-18 * * 1-5', '*/15 8-18 * * Mon-Fri', or '0,15,30,45 8-18 * * 1-5'.
The 'Save' button at the bottom of the configuration page is clicked, or the screen shows the 'legacy-inventory-sync' job dashboard indicating the configuration was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jenkins web UI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jenkins web interface in a browser, not terminal commands (like curl) or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Jenkins application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows a valid Jenkins URL and standard Jenkins UI elements, rather than a mock interface or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent entered the configuration directly into Jenkins.
integrity.visual_evidence: The cron expression and quiet period are entered into the actual Jenkins configuration form fields, not just written in a separate document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Job name: 'legacy-inventory-sync'. Quiet Period value: 120. Poll SCM schedule must match: minute (H/15, */15, or 0,15,30,45), hour (8-18), day of month (*), month (*), day of week (1-5 or Mon-Fri). Example valid schedule: 'H/15 8-18 * * 1-5'.
